Uses of Enum Class
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotAlignment

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static PotAlignment
    PotAlignment.fromPoiAlign(org.apache.poi.sl.usermodel.TextParagraph.TextAlign poiAlign)
    Converts an Apache POI TextAlign value to the corresponding PotAlignment enum constant.
    static PotAlignment
    PotAlignment.valueOf(String name)
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    static PotAlignment[]
    PotAlignment.values()
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    Methods in cc.quaternion.potshaper with parameters of type PotAlignment
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PotShape
    PotShape.align(PotAlignment alignment)
    Sets the horizontal text alignment for all paragraphs within this shape.
    PotTable
    PotTable.align(PotAlignment alignment)
    Sets the horizontal text alignment for all cells.
    PotTable.PotTableColumn
    PotTable.PotTableColumn.align(PotAlignment alignment)
    Sets the horizontal text alignment for all cells in this column.
    PotTable.PotTableRow
    PotTable.PotTableRow.align(PotAlignment alignment)
    Sets the horizontal text alignment for all cells in this row.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.align(PotAlignment alignment)
    Sets the horizontal text alignment for all paragraphs within the cell.
    PotTextBox
    PotTextBox.align(PotAlignment alignment)
    Sets the horizontal text alignment for all paragraphs within the text box.
